contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Something like: "Diagnosed and fixed multi-item Stripe checkout → QR code linkage in tokenomics. Added column Z (Stripe  
      Session ID) on Agroverse QR codes as the primary FK (the legacy column P on Stripe Social Media Checkout ID could only hold 
    one                                                                                                                             
       QR per session). Updated process_qr_code_updates.gs to write column Z and stop touching column J of Telegram Chat Logs (owned
     
      by TDG scoring). Updated qr_code_web_service.gs lookups to prefer column Z with column P fallback. Added backfill function for
     
      the 5 QR codes of the affected multi-item purchase. Documented the schema change. PR:
      https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/226
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
